title: No Void Structures
description: Utility datapack powered by Lithostitched to support floating islands style world generation by preventing structures from generating in the void
body:
# No Void Structures

The main function of this datapack powered by [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched) is to prevent common vanilla structures from generating in the void in Floating Island style world presets, like [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands). The 2.0.0 mod version is simply a wrapper for the datapack, if you want to edit anything you can either edit the datapack, or use the code as an example pack for how to stop structures from generating in the void using Lithostitched. Additionally, Mineshafts are not affected by this.

## What happened to the Old 1.0.0 Mod?
No Void Structures was one of my first Java modding projects, and because of that, it was quite frankly horrible (inflexible, incompatible, broke superflat structures, etc.). But that's okay! That's how we learn. Now using Lithostitched, it will be easier for others to edit and change.

You can view the old description of the deprecated mod, and all of the old source code on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/klinbee/No-Void-Structures).
